reflection: What have you done in the last hour? Are you okay with that?
Is this where you want to be right now?
What were you doing before you came here?
What were you hoping to find?
Name one thing you've been avoiding.
When was the last time you stood up and moved?
What would the version of you from this morning want you to do next?
What did you mean to do before you ended up here?
Is there someone waiting on something from you?
Are you bored, or are you avoiding something?
When did this stop being intentional?
What's one thing that would make today feel different?

checklist.label: Check in with yourself
items: Moved or stretched in the last hour
Is there something on your to-do list that would take under 5 minutes?
Is there anything with a deadline today?
Anyone you've been meaning to check in with?
Is there something you've been avoiding?
Have you taken a real break in the last hour?
Anything open in your head that needs to be written down?
Is your phone face-down or silenced?
